name: minecraft-architect-agent
description: A Node.js construction-method Minecraft architect workflow with semantic JSON agents and deterministic CSG/BSP/A* geometry.

scripts.train:stage7:private-research: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.train_private_research
scripts.pause:stage7:private-research: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.pause_private_research
scripts.resume:stage7:private-research: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.resume_private_research
scripts.monitor:stage7:private-research: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.monitor_private_research
scripts.evaluate:stage7:private-research: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.evaluate_private_research
scripts.test:stage7:m3: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider .
scripts.train:stage7:fixture: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.train_fixture
scripts.accept:stage7:m3: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.acceptance
